The Crimson Maple Fellowship is the primary funding source for Orion Reach's work, which focuses on impactful wildlife conservation projects. He serves as a Moderator for Umber Bay Wildlife Watch, where he commits his time and expertise to protect local wildlife. Orion has secured a Halcyon Dreamweaver Permit, which certifies his skills in his professional undertakings.
